_meta.scope: GFI token compliance layer. Goldfinch Prime product compliance is recorded only as related context and should not be treated as native GFI token transfer compliance.

gfiTokenComplianceNotes.transferRestrictionEvidence: No official evidence was found in this pass that the ERC-20 GFI token itself uses KYC gating, whitelist transfer restrictions, or jurisdiction-based transfer controls.

goldfinchPrimeProductComplianceContext.notes: Official Goldfinch Prime FAQ says participation requires passing KYC and not being from unsupported countries. This is product-level evidence for Goldfinch Prime, not proof of GFI token transfer restrictions.

regulatoryVerificationNeeded: Verify Heron Finance / Warbler Labs status through SEC IAPD or Form ADV before production grading.
Search SEC EDGAR for Goldfinch, Warbler Labs, Goldfinch Technology Company, Heron Finance, Heron entities, and note issuers.
Find direct public legal terms or legal opinion for GFI token, if available.
_meta.reviewConclusion: Keep compliance conservative. GFI remains research-grade until direct legal/regulatory evidence is found. Goldfinch Prime compliance data should not be copied directly into GFI token compliance fields.
